title: Random Items
description: a texture pack that changes the texture of the items and randomizes them
body:
this texture pack changes the appearance of items and makes them random, like this 
![Random Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac02e1f8e838802d05d6121eba2b54ac4432267b.png)
![Random Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48e547c1a4ee27b3b73aea1b6f488a7318f5dc06.png)

this texture pack does not need optifine.

this texture pack is compatible with all versions from 1.21.5 to 1.15
